name: Quick Fetuccini Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the bacon in a small skillet until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain well on a paper towel.
2. Cook fettuccini noodles according to package instruction until firm and tender.
3. Meanwhile, beat the eggs thoroughly in a large bowl suitable for serving.
4. When the pasta is done, drain it immediately in a colander and pour into the bowl of eggs.
5. Toss the pasta with the beaten eggs, ensuring each strand is coated.
6. Sprinkle the cooked bacon, Italian seasoning, chopped parsley over the pasta.
7. Serve immediately, topped with freshly grated Parmesan cheese and freshly ground black pepper.
